pageContext.name: Became Smaller Nezuko Kamado (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Became Smaller Nezuko Kamado (Shake The Sword Burn Your Heart) Statue!  This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Nezuko Kamado from Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 2.6' tall, Nezuko is seen here in a contemplative pose bearing her iconic bamboo mouth-restraint.  Demon Slayer fans, be sure to enhance your anime figure collection with the Nezuko Kamado statue today!
